meta.title: Omnia.AI — AI site builder: write prompts, get a ready website
meta.description: Describe your site in words — Omnia.AI generates pages, backend, domain and hosting. Version history with a one-click rollback on every prompt. Billed in rubles, no subscriptions.
meta.keywords: AI site builder, website generator, website turnkey, AI website builder, landing page from prompt, no-code site, build a site without a developer

hero.subtitle: Omnia builds a full-stack site, backend, database and deployment in one conversation. 9 curated stacks, ruble billing and a rollback button under every prompt.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue working on your projects.
